detail.description:
Get an engaging jigsaw puzzle experience with one of the world’s most-downloaded puzzle games from a top developer!

Jigsaw Puzzles is an addictive, easy to play game for seniors with over 30,000 FREE cute HD pictures. No points, no gimmicks, and no missing pieces, simply enjoy hours of fun putting jigsaw puzzles together to calm down and relax.

Created by game experts and played by millions of puzzle lovers worldwide, Jigsaw Puzzles helps you exercise your short-term memory and concentration,
detail.recentChanges:
- Performance and stability improvements

We read all your reviews and always try to make the game better. Please leave us some feedback if you love what we do and feel free to suggest any improvements. Make every day relaxing and fun putting puzzle pieces together!
